hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/frontend/'; then cd /var/home/julius/git/music/frontend && npx prettier --write "$FILE"; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/backend/'; then cd /var/home/julius/git/music/backend && npx prettier --plugin=prettier-plugin-java --write "$FILE"; fi
